mapper.select:
SELECT a.* FROM sm_organization a
INNER JOIN sm_rel_op_org rel ON a.org_id = rel.org_id
WHERE a.expire_date IS NULL
AND rel.expire_date is null AND rel.op_id = #{query.opId}
AND a.org_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.orgName},'%')
AND a.parent_id = #{query.parentId} AND a.org_id != #{query.parentId}
ORDER BY a.create_date ASC

SELECT DISTINCT org.org_id, org.org_code,org.org_type, org.org_name,org.org_desc,org.org_path, org.parent_id,org.is_data_control, org.create_id,org.create_date, org.modify_id,org.modify_date,org.expire_date,org.status FROM sm_organization org
INNER JOIN sm_rel_op_org rel ON org.org_id = rel.org_id AND rel.expire_date IS NULL AND org.expire_date IS NULL
WHERE org.expire_date is NULL
AND rel.op_id = #{opId}
ORDER BY org.parent_id ,org.create_date ASC

SELECT t.* FROM sm_organization t WHERE 1 = 1 and t.expire_date is null and t.org_id in ( select o.org_id from sm_rel_op_org o where o.op_id = #{opId} and o.rel_type = #{relType} )
and (t.org_code = #{searchKey} or t.org_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKey}, '%'))
ORDER BY t.create_date DESC
